overall.description: A first-person exploration of a Victorian mansion garden at night in a video game. The player walks through an illuminated garden with a central fountain, approaches the mansion's front entrance, explores the wraparound porch, and walks through a narrow side arbor. The scene features atmospheric fog, gas lamp lighting, and autumn foliage.

agents.ego_description: walking through the garden toward the mansion, observing the illuminated fountain and flower beds

entered.detail: large two-story historic mansion with illuminated windows and front entrance
circular tiered fountain with water basin in garden center
black iron fence surrounding the property perimeter
vintage street lamps casting warm yellow light along the fence line
illuminated garden beds with white flowers along the pathway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night in a Victorian mansion garden. The camera walks forward along a stone path toward the mansion, with a central stone fountain prominently visible. Gas lamps and flower beds line the approach, while a wrought iron fence marks the property boundary in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: mansion front entrance and wraparound porch

events.description: begins ascending the front stairs toward the main entrance
turns right onto the covered porch, moving from open garden to sheltered walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing the front stairs and stepping onto the covered porch, passing large potted plants flanking the doorway

entered.detail: covered wraparound porch with wooden floor and support columns
double wooden doors with glass panels illuminated by overhead lantern
large potted ferns flanking the front entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the mansion's front entrance, climbing the stairs past illuminated flower beds. Upon reaching the top, it turns right onto a covered wooden porch. The front door with its glowing lantern becomes prominent, while the fountain recedes into the background.

events.description: moving into deeper shadow of porch overhang while view opens to street and neighboring properties

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered porch, looking out through columns at the neighboring mansions and autumn trees

entered.detail: another Victorian house visible across the street through the porch columns
distinctive tree with bright red autumn foliage illuminated by street lamps

segments.scene_description: Walking along the covered wooden porch, the camera moves past support columns with views of the street and neighboring Victorian mansions. A distinctive red autumn tree stands out against the foggy night. The lighting becomes darker under the porch roof while maintaining visibility of the exterior grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: side garden with view of neighboring houses

events.description: turns away from porch and walks back into garden, circling around the fountain area

agents.ego_description: walking through the garden paths, viewing the mansion from different angles and observing the red autumn tree

entered.detail: raised brick flower beds with illuminated plantings along the side yard

segments.scene_description: Leaving the porch, the camera returns to the open garden, circling around the fountain area. The mansion is now viewed from the side angle, and the red autumn tree becomes prominent on the left. The camera explores the side yard with additional garden beds before approaching a narrow passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow side passage with lattice arbor

events.description: enters narrow side passage with wooden lattice walls, transitioning from open garden to enclosed arbor walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow side arbor passage with wooden lattice walls on both sides

entered.detail: covered walkway with arched wooden lattice walls and overhead vines
wooden trellis walls creating a tunnel-like passage along the house side

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow side passage with wooden lattice walls creating an arbor tunnel. The space becomes enclosed and darker, with the mansion wall on one side and the lattice fence on the other. The transition from open garden to confined walkway is marked by overhead vines and reduced lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an illuminated Victorian garden that transitions from an open, atmospheric estate into a confined, shadowed arbor. It begins by gliding along a stone path toward a central fountain, passing gas lamps and flower beds under a heavy fog. As the camera ascends the stairs to the mansion's front entrance, the view shifts from the open garden to a covered wooden porch, where the lighting dims beneath the roof and reveals neighboring mansions and a vibrant red autumn tree. The scene then opens back up as the camera circles away from the house to view the mansion from a side angle, passing the red tree once more while navigating the outer garden beds. Finally, the movement leads into a narrow side passage, where the open landscape is replaced by an enclosed tunnel of wooden lattice walls and overhead vines.
